expected_records.title: Cabana Rentals
expected_records.description: To make a reservation, please call 407-WDW-PLAY.

description.text: To make a reservation, please call 407-WWDW-PLAY.

expected_records.title: Poolside Activities
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Tuesday, Wednesday, Thursday and Saturday at 1:00pm; Monday and Friday at 2:30pm
expected_records.description: Join us for fun-filled games and dancing, both in and out of the pool. See a Recreation Cast Member for more information.

location.text: Contemporary Feature Pool: Monday and Friday at 2:30pm

expected_records.title: Olympiad Fitness Center
expected_records.schedule_text: Open 24 hours a day, 7 days a week
expected_records.description: Continue pushing towards your wellness goals in our full-service fitness center.

expected_records.title: Mickey Tie-Dye
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Tuesday, Thursday and Saturday from 3:00pm-4:00pm
expected_records.location: Outside of Community Hall at Bay Lake Tower
expected_records.description: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and crafts favorite!

location.text: Outside of Community Hall at Bay Lake Tower

description.text: Get creative with a Disney twist on this arts and
crafts favorite!

expected_records.title: Pickleball Clinic
expected_records.description: This complimentary introduction to pickleball will teach the basics of the game everyone is talking about. Learn skills and techniques, then compete in our Pickleball Challenge at the end of the clinic! Visit Community Hall or call 407-824-1347 to pre-register. Space is limited.

description.text: This complimentary introduction to pickleball will
teach the basics of the game everyone is talking
about. Learn skills and techniques, then compete
in our Pickleball Challenge at the end of the clinic!
Visit Community Hall or call 407-824-1347 to
pre-register. Space is limited.

expected_records.title: Campfire
expected_records.location: Courtyard Campfire Pit between Contemporary Tower and Bay Lake Tower
expected_records.description: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.

location.text: Courtyard Campfire Pit between Contemporary Tower

description.text: Enjoy the warm glow of the campfire with complimentary
marshmallows. S’mores kits available for purchase.

expected_records.title: Silent Disco
expected_records.schedule_text: Sunday, Monday, Wednesday and Friday from 8:00pm-9:00pm
expected_records.description: Choose your favorite music, don your own headphones, and “silently” dance the night away with us!

description.text: Choose your favorite music, don your own headphones,
and “silently” dance the night away with us!

expected_records.title: Disney Fit Yoga
expected_records.location: The Lawn between Contemporary Tower and Bay Lake Tower
expected_records.description: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session. Designed for all levels, this experience incorporates various poses set to your favorite Disney music!

description.text: Ground yourself with a gentle yoga session.
Designed for all levels, this experience incorporates
various poses set to your favorite Disney music!

expected_records.title: The Magic Of Mosaics
expected_records.location: Lakeside Landing between the Boat Nook Marina and Contemporary Feature Pool
expected_records.description: Create your own one-of-a-kind mosaic inspired by the artwork of Mary Blair! Visit Community Hall or call 407-824-1347 to book this experience. Check-in begins at 12:45pm to participate.

location.text: Lakeside Landing between the Boat Nook Marina
